title: GMS Week 49 - LACKLUSTER!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 09/12/2023
Image reference: 2023-12-09_gms-week-49-lackluster_img1.jpg
The lackluster end to the year in sub continent recycling markets continues for another week as disappointed owners and cash buyers face selling their inventory into markets where prices have slumped. Indeed, several dry bulk sales were done below USD 500/LT LDT into India in the lowest confirmed deals for several months. Steel prices have declined in India by almost 10 percent, in a shock to many, particularly as international steel prices have pushed on to an impressive extent over the last month.
